pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires saving to /home/ga/rapid_station.scml, and export_result.sh checks this exact path.
Task description requires Network Code TR, and export_result.sh queries for code='TR'.
Task description requires Station Code RAPID, and export_result.sh queries for code='RAPID'.
Task description explicitly specifies Latitude 37.5, which is checked by export_result.sh.
Task description explicitly specifies Longitude 137.2, which is checked by export_result.sh.
Task description requires Stream Code BHZ, and export_result.sh queries for st.code='BHZ'.
Task description specifies SampleRateNumerator 20 and SampleRateDenominator 1 (20.0 Hz). This is also explicitly checked in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically generate a SeisComP inventory XML file from scratch via a Python script. All expected values (Network TR, Station RAPID, Lat 37.5, Lon 137.2, Stream BHZ, Sample Rate 20Hz) are explicitly defined in the task description and perfectly match the assertions evaluated in export_result.sh. The expected output file path is /home/ga/rapid_station.scml.
